steps: Turn on Multiskan, set temp to 37ºC and set up plate layout.
Sonicate tissue on ice in 20mM PB pH 7.4 with PMSF inhibitor or thaw prepared samples on ice.
Prepare NADH, enough for whole plate.
Dilute samples 1:5 with de-ionized H ² O.
Using a clear plate: Add 50µL sample to wells and 50µL diluted sample to wells in duplicate.
Add 50µL buffer to 3 wells for blanks for positive control.
Add 100µL Tris-Mes to each sample and blanks.
For negative control add 200µL Tris-Mes to 3 wells.
Place plate in Multiskan and add 50µL 600µM NADH to the sample and positive blanks. Do not add NADH to the 3 negative control wells.
Press start and read at 340nm for 10 minutes @ 1 minute intervals.
Save raw data as an Excel file into the NADHx data folder. Use the naming convention NAXXXX.xls, where XXXX is the date in mmdd format.
creator: Lili Liang
